mapper.select:
/* selectShipperList */ SELECT shipper_id, company_id, use_yn, shipper_cd, vat_yn, bill_stdr_cd, taxbil_output_yn, communication_fee, untpc, weight_untpc, bill_company_id, excclc_company_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM shipper WHERE del_yn = 'N'
AND shipper_id = #{shipperId}

/* existShipperById */ SELECT shipper_id, company_id, use_yn, shipper_cd, vat_yn, bill_stdr_cd, taxbil_output_yn, communication_fee, untpc, weight_untpc, bill_company_id, excclc_company_id, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM shipper WHERE company_id = #{companyId}
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM shipper WHERE bill_company_id = #{billCompanyId} AND del_yn = 'N' )
mapper.insert: /* insertCompanyShipper */ INSERT INTO shipper ( company_id, use_yn, shipper_cd, vat_yn, bill_stdr_cd, bill_char_cd , taxbil_output_yn, communication_fee, untpc, weight_untpc, bill_company_id, excclc_company_id, reg_id, chg_id, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{param.companyId}, #{param.useYn}, #{param.shipperCd}, #{param.vatYn}, #{param.billStdrCd}, #{param.billCharCd}, #{param.taxbilOutputYn}, #{param.communicationFee}, #{param.untpc}, #{param.weightUntpc}, #{param.billCompanyId}, #{param.excclcCompanyId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, #{memberInfo.memberId}, 'N' )
mapper.update: /* updateShipper */ UPDATE shipper SET company_id = #{param.companyId}, shipper_cd = #{param.shipperCd}, vat_yn = #{param.vatYn}, bill_stdr_cd = #{param.billStdrCd}, taxbil_output_yn = #{param.taxbilOutputYn}, communication_fee = #{param.communicationFee}, untpc = #{param.untpc}, weight_untpc = #{param.weightUntpc}, bill_company_id = #{param.billCompanyId}, excclc_company_id = #{param.excclcCompanyId}, use_yn = #{param.useYn}, chg_id = #{memberInfo.memberId}, chg_dt = now() WHERE shipper_id = #{param.shipperId} AND company_id = #{param.companyId}
/* deleteShipper */ UPDATE shipper SET del_yn = 'Y', use_yn = 'Y', chg_id = #{memberInfo.memberId}, chg_dt = now() WHERE shipper_id = #{param.shipperId}
mapper.delete: /* deleteShipperById */ DELETE FROM shipper WHERE company_id = #{companyId}
